messages.idle_goodbye: I've been idle for a while, so I've cleared my working context for this thread. Reply here to start again.
messages.shutdown_goodbye: I'm going to bed now, so I'm clearing my working context for this thread. When I wake up, please remind me what you want to do.
messages.restart_notice: I'm awake again, but I don't have my earlier working context for this thread. Tell me what you want to check.
messages.server_offline: The OpAMP server is currently offline. Please try again shortly.
messages.slack_error_reply: sorry a bit dizzy at the moment
messages.help: Try `/opamp status collector-a`, `/opamp tool_otel_agents host_name=alpha client_version=1.2`, or mention me with a question like `@OpAMP why is collector-a unhealthy?`
